content_fingerprint: openai publishes gpt 5 5 system card documenting model behavior and safety post training openai released the system card for its gpt 5 5 model detailing post training behavior safety evaluations and known limitations as part of its standard disclosure process openai published the system card for its gpt 5 5 model on april 23 2026 making the document publicly available via the company s newsroom and model documentation pages system cards are openai s standard mechanism for disclosing post training behavior safety testing results known failure modes and evaluated risks for a given model release
